svg.title: Unified hiring tool — concept map
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing six modules surrounding a central data core, with four stakeholder groups mapped to the modules they interact with.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the application tracking module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the interview scheduling module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the candidate communications module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the stakeholder visibility module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the offer and onboarding module')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the analytics and reporting module')
